name: Enauta Participacoes S.A.
summary: Enauta Participa竏堙可ｬﾃ溪嫄ﾃ可ｬﾂｵes S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, production, and sale of oil, natural gas, and byproducts in Brazil. The company has a portfolio of 13 exploratory blocks, 1 asset under development, and 1 producing asset. Its principal asset is the 45% working interest owned Manati Field located in the Camamu basin, Bahia. The company was formerly known as QGEP Participa竏堙可ｬﾃ溪嫄ﾃ可ｬﾂｵes S.A. and changed its name to Enauta Participa竏堙可ｬﾃ溪嫄ﾃ可ｬﾂｵes S.A. in April 2019. Enauta Participa竏堙可ｬﾃ溪嫄ﾃ可ｬﾂｵes S.A. was founded in 2010 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. Enauta Participa竏堙可ｬﾃ溪嫄ﾃ可ｬﾂｵes S.A. is a subsidiary of Queiroz Galv竏堙可ｬﾂ｣o S.A.
